description: White House infographic laid over a dimmed photographic background of a data center server hall (rows of racks receding into the distance), tinted near-black navy. At the top center is the White House line-drawing emblem above the words 'THE WHITE HOUSE' and 'WASHINGTON' in a thin serif. The title is set in a large white serif font inside a solid bright-green banner reading 'Ratepayer Protection Pledge'. Below in white sans-serif is an intro sentence: 'Companies agree to protect American consumers from price hikes due to data center energy & lower electricity costs for consumers, including by:' followed by a numbered list of five bold items: '1. Building, Bringing, or Buying New Power Supply', '2. Paying for New Power Delivery Infrastructure Upgrades', '3. Paying Whether They Use the Power or Not', '4. Investing in Local Job Creation & Workforce Development', '5. Contributing to Electric & Community Resilience'. The composition is centered; the green banner is the only accent color. The tweet text reads 'No more sticking Americans with the bill'.
notable_text: Ratepayer Protection Pledge. Companies agree to protect American consumers from price hikes due to data center energy & lower electricity costs for consumers, including by: 1. Building, Bringing, or Buying New Power Supply 2. Paying for New Power Delivery Infrastructure Upgrades 3. Paying Whether They Use the Power or Not 4. Investing in Local Job Creation & Workforce Development 5. Contributing to Electric & Community Resilience. THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON
